title: Custom getter method should not be used to override record's getter behavior
description: In Java records, the accessor methods (getters) are automatically generated and should not be manually overridden. Overriding these methods can lead to unexpected behavior and breaks the immutability and simplicity guarantees of records.
recommendation: Do not define custom getter methods in records. Use the default accessors provided by the record declaration.
impact: Overriding record accessors can introduce bugs, reduce code clarity, and violate the intended use of records as simple data carriers.

checks.message: Do not define custom getter methods in records. Use the default accessors provided by the record declaration.

original_logic_description: Check for record declarations that define a method with the same name as a record component. Flag if such a method is present.
